reviews.review_msg: Fair TA, workload was also not overwhelming. I appreciated that he took time to explain the theoretical concepts. He also helped me a lot with my research paper.

He is a terrible TA. His answers to questions are irrelevant and he is very unclear in terms of instructions. I never understand what he was trying to say in class. Also, he is very mean. Went to him for help and he said he did not have time. Followed his instructions and advice on my proposal (which he gave a B+) end up with a C- on the term paper

He gives you advice and has a good scope of knowledge. Hes not there to make it like high school and hold your hand. I think he encourages a very open structure tutorial to engage with the readings. Its not hard to find an ad weekly

oh my.. i can never understand what he says.. he doesnt form his sentence/question well. he's also very mean and he likes to 'corner' people with questions.. not a TA that facilitates discussion well for sure. not recommended
